items.name_cn:
Style No.6411.
✨MCM✨ This Dessau drawstring bag is named after a historically 📝 significant center for Bauhaus design. The bag features a classic style that integrates form and function, paying tribute to the famous art movement. The classic Visetos🌷 pattern combined with Nappa leather🐂 showcases the charm of traditional craftsmanship. Inside hides a detachable classic pattern clutch, which can be used as an independent 👝 wallet. The included leather handle and adjustable🐂 leather shoulder strap make this bag elegant and versatile. Dimensions: 26x22x13

items.name_en: Style No.6821- Summer New 🌷MCM🌷 Original Patricia Visetos Mini Saddle Bag. This Patricia shoulder bag is a 🌷MCM🌷 classic, based on the classic Patty style, combining Bauhaus-inspired design and craftsmanship, showcasing 🌷MCM🌷's excellent heritage in making luxury goods. The bag front is decorated with a shiny laurel lock, an ideal choice for creating a charming look. Dimensions: 7 x 18 x 18

items.name_en: Style No.6827 🪡MCM👜 New TRACY Vintage Flap Handbag/Crossbody: Simple and sharp lines, minimalist versatile shape, creating a refined look... Classic MCM pattern elements present a unique layered visual effect. Designed for daily wear or quick trips, the lightweight shape. Laurel lock, high-profile interpretation of MCM identity, unique retro style. Equipped with an adjustable shoulder strap, lightweight and convenient, changing different looks. Internal details/structured and simple interior, easily accommodating daily essentials. Dimensions approx: 18x14x6cm

items.name_en: Travel Bag 💫MCM💫 Traveler Visetos Weekend Travel Bag. Made of durable Visetos print 🌺 coated canvas and bonded lining, this item reduces weight and is one of our top lightweight Visetos weekend ✈️ travel bags. This classic design features an easy-to-close extended ⛓️ zipper and can be folded for storage when not in use. Dimensions: Length 50cm, Height 29cm, Bottom Thickness 20cm
